code:
import io
import string

fn is_digit(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b >= 48 and b <= 57
end

fn gcd(_ x: Int, _ y: Int) -> Int
  mut a = x
  mut b = y
  while b != 0
    let t = b
    b = a % b
    a = t
  end
  a
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut a = 0
mut b = 0
mut which = 0
mut cur = 0
mut in_num = false
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(byte)
    if is_digit(byte)
      cur = cur * 10 + (byte - 48)
      in_num = true
    else
      if in_num
        if which == 0
          a = cur
          which = 1
        else
          b = cur
        end
        cur = 0
        in_num = false
      end
    end
  when None
    i = i
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if in_num
  if which == 0
    a = cur
  else
    b = cur
  end
end
let g = gcd(a, b)
print("gcd=#{g}")
